channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 5 Inkerman (on Alma St), 6th June
item.description:
The new bike hangar doesn't open without hitting the tree and already damaging it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Inkerman Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents parking times insufficent, 6th June
item.description:
Residents parking needs extending to all day and weekends
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown, 6th June
item.description:
Tree overgrown affecting path and highway reducing car parking. Maintain it or cut it down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 6th June
item.description:
Fallen branch obstructing road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London

item.title: DoorsX2 & cabinet, 6th June
item.description:
Two wooden doors & a medicine cabinet. Please collect . This is in Barry road opposite Nisa .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet flytipped on street been there for over a week, 6th June
item.description:
Carpet flytipped on street been there for over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hamilton Road SE27 opposite side of the road to house, 6th June
item.description:
Hamilton Road SE27 opposite side of the road to house number 129 Hamilton Road is the plain brick wall of Hamilton Road Industrial Estate. Said wall graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage on street, 6th June
item.description:
Lots of waste on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement &edging, 6th June
item.description:
The pavement tiles are broken and damaged and the edging is falling apart

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mundania Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please collect, 6th June
item.description:
This has been left there for at least three weeks. Please collect .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mundania Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed Ford focus with no MOT dumped on Barnfield Estate next to Kelham House, 6th June
item.description:
Photos taken 6th June 2026. Area is notorious for untaxed cars dumped by illicit business.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayplace Lane, Plumstead

item.title: Fridge freezer dumped outside 117-122 Barnfield Gardens, 6th June
item.description:
Photos taken 6th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead

item.title: Advertising boards, 6th June
item.description:
Advertising boards have appeared either end of Crombie road on council signposts. Boards causing visual obstruction to drivers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Crombie Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase dumped on Genesta Road, 6th June
item.description:
In the middle of the road photos taken 6th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Genesta Road, Plumstead

item.title: Carpet dumped on Genesta Road, 6th June
item.description:
On the east end near plum lane. Photos taken 6th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous new island crossing, 6th June
item.description:
I’d say this is an accident waiting to happen. The newly installed island doesn’t have anything to indicate to drivers that is it there. No cones or signs and no white lines to indicate it’s there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Forest commercial hire bicycles negligently abandoned blocking the footway and causing a hazard to blind, partially sighted, mobility aid and pram and pushchair users, in Cottingham Rd 5m from the jct with High St, Penge., 6th June
item.description:
Two Forest commercial hire bicycles negligently abandoned blocking the footway and causing a hazard to blind, partially sighted, mobility aid and pram and pushchair users, in Cottingham Rd 5m from the jct with High St, Penge. Seen at 5pm Saturday 6/6/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 195, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement, 6th June
item.description:
Dangerous broken pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Crombie Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fridge freezer on pavement, 6th June
item.description:
The fridge freezer is located outside 31 Latham Road, it appeared over 2 weeks ago, starting off on the pavement then moved on to the driveway of 31 Latham Road then moved to the edge of the pavement by the tree. It’s been attracting young people who have tried to tip it into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Latham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction debris dumped on pavement on Dallin Road, 6th June
item.description:
Outside the allotments. Photos taken 6th June 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
